Module 10 - Lesson 1
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:
• EPC - Earnings Per Click/AVV - Average Visitor Value!
• CPC - Cost Per Click/CPV 	- Cost Per Visitor!
• AFEV 	- Average Front-End Transaction Value!
• CPS - Cost Per Sale!
• LCV 	- Lifetime Customer Value

-- 1 of 6 --

Module 10 - Lesson 1
1. EPC - Earnings Per Click:!
• What Is It: Tells You How Much A Single Click
(Visitor) Is Worth To You!
• Why You Need To Know It: Because It Tells You
What You Can Afford To Invest Per Click (Per
Visitor)
*This Is Also Often Referred To As Average Visitor Value (AVV)
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:

-- 2 of 6 --

Module 10 - Lesson 1
2. CPC - Cost Per Click (Visitor):!
• What Is It: Tells You How Much It Cost You To
Generate A Single Click (Visitor)!
• Why You Need To Know It: Because, Without
Knowing This Number, Knowing EPC 	Doesn’t Tell
You Whether An Ad Campaign Is Viable Or Not
*This Is Also Often Referred To As Cost Per Visitor (CPV)
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:

-- 3 of 6 --

Module 10 - Lesson 1
3. AFEV - Average Front-End Transaction Value:!
• What Is It: Tells You How Much, On Average, Each
New Customer Spends With You Their First
Transaction!
• Why You Need To Know It: Because It Tells You
What You Can Afford To Invest To Acquire A New
Customer (Without Going Negative)
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:

-- 4 of 6 --

Module 10 - Lesson 1
4. CPS - Cost Per Sale:!
• What Is It: Tells You How Much It Cost You, On
Average, To Generate A Sale (New Customer)!
• Why You Need To Know It: Because, When
Subtracted From AFEV	, It Tells You The Return
On Investment Per New Customer
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:

-- 5 of 6 --

Module 10 - Lesson 1
5. LCV - Lifetime Customer Value:!
• What Is It: Tells You How Much An Average
Customer Is Worth To Your Business Over The
Span Of Their Entire Patronage!
• Why You Need To Know It: Because, When
Viewed Alongside ROI 	On The Front-End, It Tells
You How Much Profit You Generate Per Customer
5 Marketing Metrics You Need To Know & Why:

-- 6 of 6 --
